---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a retrieval improvement, new agent, or architecture change
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve

<!-- Describe the use case or gap. Be specific — "retrieval is bad" is not actionable; "Non-Compete R@3 is 35% because..." is. -->

## Proposed approach

<!-- How would you implement this? If you have a benchmark hypothesis, state it. -->

## Expected impact

<!-- What metric or behaviour would improve? E.g. "expect +3–5pp R@3 on Non-Compete" -->

## Trade-offs / risks

<!-- Latency cost? Rate-limit risk? Could it regress other categories (see Change of Control alt query precedent)? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else did you evaluate before landing on this approach? -->
